The '''AP-3 attack droid''' (Assault Platform-3), also known as an '''AP-3''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] used by the [[Imperial Remnant]]. The AP-3 resembled an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]], but it was armed with six [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]] and micro-proton torpedoes. It also possessed a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] drive that enabled it to move quicker across the battlefield at the order of an [[AP-1-C attack droid|AP-1-C]].<ref name="Cadinth">{{GalaxyCite|2|The Battle of Cadinth}}</ref>

The attack droid saw combat during the [[Battle of Cadinth]].<ref name="Cadinth" />

==Behind the scenes==
The "Imperial Attack Droid C" model was designed for the abandoned ''[[The Epic Continues]]'' story line. The prototype model was made by kitbashing figures of [[FX-7/Legends|FX-7]] and a [[Power droid/Legends|Power droid]].<ref name="Droid C">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=50971|text=1985-86 Line Extension Presentation Binder Page 16 - Imperial Attack Droid C|work=The Star Wars Collectors Archive|archivedate=20161118020536}}</ref> It later appeared in the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity where it was officially named the AP-3 attack droid.<ref name="Cadinth" />
